testcase.name: [BeforeSuite]
[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client go calls server go and echoes the ascii payload [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-echo, go-go, pair-go-go, payload-ascii]
[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client go calls server go and echoes the unicode payload [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-echo, go-go, pair-go-go, payload-unicode]
[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client go calls server go and echoes the symbols payload [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-echo, go-go, pair-go-go, payload-symbols]
[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client go calls server go and echoes the long payload [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-echo, go-go, pair-go-go, payload-long]
[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client go observes the message-only response from server go [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-message-only, go-go, pair-go-go, scenario-message-only]
[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client go observes the task-failure response from server go [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-task-failure, go-go, pair-go-go, scenario-task-failure]
[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client go observes the input-required response from server go [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-input-required, go-go, pair-go-go, scenario-input-required]
[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client go observes the streaming response from server go [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-streaming, go-go, pair-go-go, scenario-streaming]
[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client go observes the task-cancel response from server go [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-task-cancel, go-go, pair-go-go, scenario-task-cancel]
[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client go observes the multi-turn response from server go [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-multi-turn, go-go, pair-go-go, scenario-multi-turn]
[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client go observes a completed task with an echoed artifact from server go [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-lifecycle, go-go, pair-go-go]
[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client python calls server go and echoes the ascii payload [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-echo, python-go, pair-python-go, payload-ascii]
[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client python calls server go and echoes the unicode payload [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-echo, python-go, pair-python-go, payload-unicode]
[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client python calls server go and echoes the symbols payload [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-echo, python-go, pair-python-go, payload-symbols]
[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client python calls server go and echoes the long payload [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-echo, python-go, pair-python-go, payload-long]

[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client python observes the message-only response from server go [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-message-only, python-go, pair-python-go, scenario-message-only]

[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client python observes the task-failure response from server go [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-task-failure, python-go, pair-python-go, scenario-task-failure]

[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client python observes the input-required response from server go [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-input-required, python-go, pair-python-go, scenario-input-required]
[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client python observes the streaming response from server go [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-streaming, python-go, pair-python-go, scenario-streaming]

[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client python observes the task-cancel response from server go [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-task-cancel, python-go, pair-python-go, scenario-task-cancel]
[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client python observes the multi-turn response from server go [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-multi-turn, python-go, pair-python-go, scenario-multi-turn]
[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client python observes a completed task with an echoed artifact from server go [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-lifecycle, python-go, pair-python-go]
[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client go calls server python and echoes the ascii payload [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-echo, go-python, pair-go-python, payload-ascii]
[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client go calls server python and echoes the unicode payload [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-echo, go-python, pair-go-python, payload-unicode]
[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client go calls server python and echoes the symbols payload [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-echo, go-python, pair-go-python, payload-symbols]
[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client go calls server python and echoes the long payload [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-echo, go-python, pair-go-python, payload-long]

[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client go observes the message-only response from server python [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-message-only, go-python, pair-go-python, scenario-message-only]

[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client go observes the task-failure response from server python [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-task-failure, go-python, pair-go-python, scenario-task-failure]

[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client go observes the input-required response from server python [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-input-required, go-python, pair-go-python, scenario-input-required]
[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client go observes the streaming response from server python [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-streaming, go-python, pair-go-python, scenario-streaming]

[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client go observes the task-cancel response from server python [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-task-cancel, go-python, pair-go-python, scenario-task-cancel]
[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client go observes the multi-turn response from server python [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-multi-turn, go-python, pair-go-python, scenario-multi-turn]
[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client go observes a completed task with an echoed artifact from server python [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-lifecycle, go-python, pair-go-python]
[It] A2A SLIMRPC interoperability SLIMRPC client python calls server python and echoes the ascii payload [suite-slim-a2a, slimrpc, behavior-echo, python-python, pair-python-python, payload-ascii]
